description: Picture of Arun and I at the train station on our way to manchester.
Picture of my teamate, the Burnley college Silver medallists and I posing for the photo.
Video of me interacting with Baxter-The selfie robot. It was being showcased on the same competition days.
Me playing around with one of the demo electro-pneumatic systems on the competition venue.
MPS sorting station showed during the competition.
Arun and I after finishing Task D (penultimate task) on the second day of the competition.
Sticker picture of our lecturer Nick on Baxter-The Selfie Robot. The robot was being showcased at the competition venue.
Fancy soaps we had back at the hotel.
Arun and I playing around with the final system we made on the final competition day.
Mirror selfie of me wearing the worldskills red shirt (and my creepy grin).
Arun and I posing in front of our workstation during the national finals.
Hotel breakfast baconator I made during one of the competition days.
A mechatronics MPS station. It's essentially a scale model of a factory station.
A mechatronics MPS station. It's essentially a scale model of a factory station.
Our workstation after the final task of the competition.
Arun and I posing in front of our workstation after the final task.
Another shot of an MPS station after it's been (mostly) built.
Me polnareff posing in front of our workstation after the finals task.
A shot of the ceremony venue.
Promotional picture WorldSkills took of me doing a tasks. This picture got used a lot on their socials such as Facebook and Instagram.
Picture of Arun, the competition organizers and I taken after the medal ceremony.
Instagram post from my university celebrating our achievement.
Promotional material showing Arun and I's gold medal. This was included in the 2025 competitor handbook.
Worldskills X post celebrating our Automation gold medal.
Another post from my university celebrating Arun and I's achievement.
Worldskills promotional post showcasing all the names for the 2024 UK finalists (try to find me!).
Section in Worldskills competitor booklet showcasing mentioning our gold medal.
Ceremony shot of our names in the stage screen.
Shot of Arun and I receiving the medal.
Worldskills promotional instagram post of me working on one of the Automation tasks.
Arun and I posing in front of our workstation on our first day setup.
The entrance of the medal ceremony at Manchester.
Arun and I arriving at the medal ceremony.
Video of us at the beginning of the medal ceremony. It was much bigger than I expected.
Arun and I at the ceremony when the results were announced. This was filmed right next to us.
Video of us at the ceremony collecting our medals.
Picture I took of my medal when I arrived back home.
Arun and I coming back to London.
Me smiling on a train.
Arun and I posing with our medals on the ceremony
Me checking if the gold medal was made of chocolate (it wasn't).
Picture of us outside the medal ceremony.
Me polnareff posing in at the worldskills ceremony next to Arun.
Me back at the ceremony after taking the medal photos.
Arun and I right after winning the medal on our way to shoot the photos. We were fizzing with joy.
Our competition system after the final competition task.
Video of us on the bus that's on the way to the competition.
The sheep that were outside the hotel as viewed from the inside of the bus going to the competition venue.
Another video from the inside of the bus. I was eating the baconator I made before.
Video of the entrance of the hotel we stayed at.
Dining hall at the hotel.
Arun and I entering the hotel room during the finals.
Arun and I at the worldskills welcome conference.
Arun and I on our first day prepping the new and fresh equipment.
Arun and I arriving at Tameside college were the competitions were being hosted.
Arun and I arriving at Manchester train station.
Arun and I on the train on our way to Manchester.
Arun and I's picture after the medal ceremony.
